home.title: Regex Shuttle — Free Online Regex Tester, Explainer & Cheat Sheet
home.subtitle: Test, explain, and learn regular expressions in your browser. Real-time matching, pattern library, substitution, and cheat sheet. 100% private. Free forever.
home.feature1Desc: See matches highlighted as you type. Instant feedback with match details, groups, and indices.
home.feature2Desc: Understand any regex with plain English explanations. Break down complex patterns token by token.
home.feature3Desc: Copy common regex patterns instantly. Email, URL, phone, IP address, and more ready-to-use patterns.
home.feature4Desc: Test find-and-replace with regex. Preview replacement results in real time with capture group references.
home.feature5Desc: Quick reference for regex syntax. Characters, quantifiers, anchors, groups, and flags at a glance.
home.feature6Desc: All testing happens in your browser. No data is ever uploaded to any server. Your patterns stay on your device.
home.step1Desc: Type your regular expression in the pattern field with optional flags like g, i, m
home.step2Desc: Paste or type the text you want to test against your regex pattern
home.step3Desc: View all matches highlighted with detailed information including groups and indices
home.privacyBadge: Your data never leaves your device
home.whyRegexP1: Regular expressions are deceptively easy to write and notoriously hard to get right. A pattern that looks correct can silently miss edge cases, over-match, or fail on real-world input — and you often don't find out until it reaches production. A dedicated regex tester collapses that feedback loop from minutes to milliseconds: you type a pattern, paste representative text, and immediately see what matches, what doesn't, and exactly where each match starts and ends. That instant visibility is what turns regex from guesswork into engineering.
home.whyRegexP2: The payoff goes beyond convenience. Testing patterns interactively prevents costly mistakes — a too-greedy quantifier that corrupts a data migration, a validation regex that rejects valid emails, or a catastrophic-backtracking pattern that stalls your server. It also flattens the learning curve: by seeing how each token, group, and quantifier behaves against live text, you build real intuition instead of copying patterns you don't understand. Whether you're debugging a colleague's cryptic expression or crafting your first character class, working against concrete examples is the fastest, safest way to learn.
home.howDifferentP1: Many online regex tools send your patterns and test data to a server for processing. Regex Shuttle does the opposite: every match, substitution, and explanation runs entirely in your browser using the native JavaScript RegExp engine. Nothing is uploaded, logged, or stored — your patterns and the text you test against never leave your device. That makes it safe to paste sensitive log lines, customer records, or proprietary data without worrying about where it goes, and it means the tool keeps working even offline after the first load.
home.howDifferentP2: Local processing also gives you a guarantee that server-based testers can't: engine consistency. Because Regex Shuttle uses the exact same RegExp implementation that ships in your browser and Node.js, the behavior you observe here is the behavior you'll get in production JavaScript. There's no translation layer or alternate regex flavor introducing subtle differences. On top of that, you get a complete free toolkit — a real-time tester, token-by-token explainer, substitution preview, a curated pattern library, and a searchable cheat sheet — with no account, no limits, and no ads.

tester.title: Regex Tester
tester.testStringPlaceholder: Enter text to test against your regex...
tester.tooManyMatches: Warning: More than {max} matches found. Results truncated for performance.
tester.flagTip_g: g — Global: find all matches, not just the first
tester.flagTip_i: i — Case Insensitive: ignore upper/lowercase differences
tester.flagTip_m: m — Multiline: ^ and $ match the start/end of each line
tester.flagTip_s: s — DotAll: . also matches newline characters
tester.flagTip_u: u — Unicode: enable full Unicode matching

about.heroSubtitle: A fast, private, browser-based regex testing and learning tool by ShuttleLab
about.serviceP1: Regex Shuttle is a free online regular expression testing, explaining, and learning tool that processes everything directly in your browser. Unlike other regex testers that may log your patterns or require account creation, Regex Shuttle uses modern web technologies to test and explain your regular expressions without ever leaving your device. Every regex execution, every match highlight, and every explanation is computed locally using JavaScript's built-in RegExp engine.
about.serviceP2: Built by ShuttleLab, Regex Shuttle supports all standard regex features including capturing groups, lookahead/lookbehind assertions, named groups, and Unicode patterns. Whether you need to validate user input, parse log files, extract data from text, or simply learn how regular expressions work, Regex Shuttle provides a comprehensive, zero-privacy-risk environment for all your regex needs.
about.safeDesc: All regex processing happens locally in your browser. No patterns are uploaded, no data is collected, and no third parties can access your test strings.
about.privacyDesc: Start testing immediately — no sign-up, no email, no tracking. Just paste your regex and go.
about.ttlDesc: Built with developers in mind. Copy regex with flags, browse common patterns, and understand complex expressions with token-by-token explanations.
about.fastDesc: Real-time matching with 150ms debounce. See results as you type without any lag, even with complex patterns and large test strings.
about.contactDesc: Have questions, feedback, or need support?
about.supportDesc: Regex Shuttle is crafted with care by ShuttleLab — completely free. If it has helped you debug even one regex, sharing it with fellow developers is the best support we could ask for.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.intro: At Regex Shuttle, your privacy is our core value. This Privacy Policy explains our approach to data collection and processing when you use regex.shuttlelab.org.
privacyPage.section1Content: Regex Shuttle does not collect, store, or transmit any of your regular expressions, test strings, or personal data. All regex testing and explanation occurs entirely within your web browser using client-side JavaScript. Your patterns and test data never leave your device.
privacyPage.section2Content: Regex Shuttle uses your browser's localStorage to store your preferences, such as theme selection (light/dark/system) and language settings (English/Chinese). This data remains on your device and is never transmitted to our servers.
privacyPage.section3Content: Unlike many online tools, Regex Shuttle performs all operations locally in your browser. There is no server-side processing, no data uploads, and no temporary storage on remote servers. This design ensures complete privacy for your regular expressions and test data.
privacyPage.section4Content: Regex Shuttle is hosted on Cloudflare for content delivery. Cloudflare may collect standard web server logs (IP address, browser type, access time) as part of normal CDN operation. We do not use analytics trackers, advertising networks, or any other third-party services that collect user data.
privacyPage.section5Content: Regex Shuttle does not use cookies. All user preferences are stored in localStorage, which is not transmitted to our servers.
privacyPage.section6Content: Regex Shuttle does not knowingly collect any personal information from children under 13. Since we do not collect any personal data at all, our service is safe for users of all ages.
privacyPage.section7Content: We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. Any changes will be reflected in the 'Last updated' date above. Your continued use of Regex Shuttle after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
privacyPage.section8Content: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at support@shuttlelab.org.

termsPage.title: Terms of Service
termsPage.intro: Welcome to Regex Shuttle. These Terms of Service govern your use of regex.shuttlelab.org. By accessing or using Regex Shuttle, you agree to be bound by these terms.
termsPage.section1Content: Regex Shuttle is a free, browser-based regular expression testing and learning tool. All processing occurs locally in your browser — no data is uploaded to our servers. The service is provided as-is by ShuttleLab at no cost to the user.
termsPage.section2Content: By using Regex Shuttle, you represent that you are at least 13 years old and have the authority to enter into this agreement. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you must not use our service.
termsPage.section3Content: We grant you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to access and use Regex Shuttle for personal and professional purposes. You may use the tool to test and learn regular expressions.
termsPage.section4Content: You are responsible for the content you process through Regex Shuttle. You agree to use the service only for lawful purposes. You must not use the service to process any illegal or harmful content.
termsPage.section5Content: Regex Shuttle and its original content, features, and functionality are owned by ShuttleLab. The service is built with Next.js, React, and shadcn/ui.
termsPage.section6Content: Regex Shuttle is provided 'as is' without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee that the service will be uninterrupted, error-free, or produce specific results.
termsPage.section7Content: ShuttleLab shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of Regex Shuttle, including but not limited to loss of data, loss of profits, or business interruption.
termsPage.section8Content: Regex Shuttle may contain links to other ShuttleLab products or third-party websites. We are not responsible for the content or practices of these external sites.
termsPage.section9Content: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. Changes will be effective immediately upon posting. Your continued use of Regex Shuttle after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
termsPage.section10Content: For questions about these Terms, contact us at support@shuttlelab.org.
